seo.default_title: BOOST THE BEAST LAB – Performance Intelligence System
seo.default_description: Performance diagnostics at scientific level. Analyze metabolism, recovery, activity, and stress — no lab, no waiting.
seo.og_description: Your body. Your data. Your level.

hero.subtitle: Performance diagnostics from a coach who trains aspiring pro athletes. No lab. No subscription. Personalized for you in under 10 minutes.

founder.headline: MARCO COLELLA — YOUR UNFAIR ADVANTAGE
founder.story: Marco has been coaching pros and aspiring athletes for years, and teaches at FH Potsdam (sports faculty). He's seen what actually matters: not training harder, but measuring smarter. BOOST THE BEAST LAB is his method — distilled into a system anyone can use. No subscription trap, no template: the same diagnostics he otherwise only gives in 1:1 coaching.
founder.quote: I've seen athletes spend millions on diagnostics — and people who just guess. The Lab is where the two meet.
founder.portrait_alt: Marco Colella — Personal Trainer and Founder

social_proof.badge_source: Verified at Marco Colella Personal Training
social_proof.headline: THE METHOD THAT TURNS HOBBY ATHLETES INTO PROS.
social_proof.context_disclaimer: Marco has been coaching for over 15 years. His roster includes pro footballers — two examples below. Same system. Now distilled into the Lab.

jens.name: Jens Castrop
jens.club: BORUSSIA MÖNCHENGLADBACH · SOUTH KOREA NATIONAL TEAM
jens.story: Coached by Marco for years. Today a Bundesliga pro at Gladbach and a South Korea national-team player. Built with the same methodology that powers the Lab — baseline, recovery, progression, day by day.

mehmet.name: Mehmet Aydin
mehmet.story: Guided by Marco on the road to pro football. Now at FC Schalke 04. Structure instead of guesswork — exactly what the Lab translates for you.

social_proof.case_studies_more_hint: And more athletes from Marco's coaching history.

pain_points.headline: YOU'RE NOT LAZY. YOU'RE FLYING BLIND.
pain_points.subtitle: Most people don't fail at discipline — they fail at measurement. Without precise data every plan is a guess, and every app hands you the same template.

1.title: You train — but nothing changes.
1.body: Without a baseline, without recovery tracking, without stress context: more volume alone does nothing. You can't tell if you're getting stronger or sabotaging yourself.

2.title: You eat clean — but still feel drained.
2.body: Protein, water, meal timing, sleep quality, stress level — if you don't know which lever is stuck, you just spin in circles. Tracking apps give you numbers, not answers.

3.title: You want to fix things — but don't know where to start.
3.body: Fitness apps give you data. Your doctor gives you cutoff values. Nobody tells you: THIS is your 30-day plan — built around your actual life.

evidence.title: EVIDENCE-BASED
evidence.text: Built on WHO & ACSM guidelines. Scientifically calibrated.

database.title: DATABASE-BACKED ANALYSIS
database.text: Your results are benchmarked against over 10,000 scientific data points from international studies.

dimensions.title: 5 PERFORMANCE DIMENSIONS
dimensions.text: Metabolism, recovery, activity, VO2max, and stress — every dimension analyzed and scored separately.

no_doctor.title: NO DOCTOR'S APPOINTMENT
no_doctor.text: No lab, no waiting room. Performance insights — instantly.

package.title: YOUR PERFORMANCE PACKAGE
package.text: Pick your full performance report with personalized optimization and training plans — one-time, no subscription.

signup.title: CREATE YOUR ACCOUNT
signup.text: Create a secure account with email and password — so your report stays saved and available anytime.

protocol.title: 26 SCIENTIFIC QUESTIONS
protocol.text: Answer precise questions on sleep, training, nutrition, stress, and body data — calibrated to WHO & ACSM guidelines.

report.title: YOUR PERSONALIZED REPORT
report.text: Your performance report with fitness score, individual analyses, and custom optimization plans — instantly available as a premium PDF.

products.card_question: Your full performance report + personalized optimization and training plans.

wearable.subtitle_after: . If you have anything — WHOOP, Apple Health, InBody scan, DEXA report, Garmin CSV, screenshot, gym PDF — upload it and our AI reads it out. Scores get sharpened automatically.

any_file.title: ANYTHING ELSE
any_file.metrics: InBody · DEXA · Tanita · Garmin · PDF · Image · CSV

private.title: Your data stays yours
private.sub: ZIP is processed only in your browser.

optional.title: Not required
optional.sub: Analysis works perfectly without a wearable.

wearable_banner.text: ({days} days measured). The following fields were pre-filled from your real data — you can still change them any time:

hero.label: ANALYSIS PROTOCOL
hero.subtitle: Answer 26 precise questions on body, training, sleep, and lifestyle — calibrated to WHO, ACSM & IPAQ guidelines. AI calculates your scores.

main_goal.label: WHAT DO YOU ACTUALLY WANT?
main_goal.sub: Your answer drives what the report focuses on — no template, built around your goal.
main_goal.feel_better: Feel more energized and fit in daily life
main_goal.body_comp: Reduce body fat or build muscle
main_goal.stress_sleep: Sleep better and bring stress down

nutrition_painpoint.label: WHAT'S YOUR BIGGEST NUTRITION PAIN?
nutrition_painpoint.sub: Be honest — the report gives you a concrete micro-habit for it.
nutrition_painpoint.cravings_evening: Evening cravings — I can't stop eating once I start
nutrition_painpoint.low_protein: Too little protein — no idea how to hit my target
nutrition_painpoint.no_energy: No energy / afternoon crash / caffeine dependency
nutrition_painpoint.no_time: No time to cook / grabbing quick processed food
nutrition_painpoint.none: Nutrition is actually fine — no real pain point

stress_source.label: MAIN SOURCE OF YOUR STRESS?
stress_source.sub: So the report tailors stress habits to exactly this source — not generic "take a deep breath".

recovery_ritual.label: YOUR FAVORITE RECOVERY RITUAL?
recovery_ritual.sub: The report builds on this instead of forcing something new.
recovery_ritual.social: Time with people who matter to me

time_budget.label: HOW MUCH TIME DO YOU REALISTICALLY HAVE PER DAY?
time_budget.sub: Be honest — the plan should fit your life, not the other way around.

experience.label: YOUR EXPERIENCE LEVEL
experience.advanced: 5+ years training, know what I'm doing

fruit_veg.label: VEGETABLES OR FRUIT PER WEEK
fruit_veg.fast_jede: With almost every meal (18–21 per week)

standing_hours.label: HOW MANY HOURS A DAY ARE YOU ON YOUR FEET?
standing_hours.sub: Standing, walking, moving — anything that isn't sitting counts

rested.label: DO YOU FEEL RESTED IN THE MORNING?

screen_time.label: SCREEN TIME BEFORE SLEEP
screen_time.sub: Phone, laptop, TV — how long before sleep are you still on screens?

submit.email_hint: We'll send your report to this address.
submit.email_fallback_hint: We couldn't load your email automatically — please enter it.

loading_overlay.label: BOOST THE BEAST LAB · MATCHING SCIENTIFIC DATABASE
loading_overlay.step_done: All set — moving to the report…
loading_overlay.duration_hint: Don't worry — generation can take up to 5 minutes. You don't have to do anything else.
steps: Matching against BTB Lab's scientific reference database...
Applying WHO & ACSM norms to your profile...
Comparing activity data against international standards...
Mapping performance categories from global study data...
Checking sleep & recovery profile against NSF reference values...
Calculating VO2max from international fitness databases...
Matching metabolic profile against WHO classifications...
Analyzing stress & lifestyle patterns scientifically...
Calculating holistic performance index across 6 modules...
BTB Lab is generating your personalized report...
Preparing scientific findings...
Finalizing your personal report...

analyse_prepare.label: OPTIONAL · YOUR DATA
analyse_prepare.headline: Sharper scores. From your data.
analyse_prepare.subtitle: Upload any file that has your numbers in it — WHOOP export, Apple Health export, InBody/DEXA/Tanita scan, Garmin CSV, fitness-app screenshot, gym PDF. Our AI reads it and pre-fills the questionnaire. Or skip this step — the questionnaire works without it.

dropzone.title: DROP YOUR FILES OR FOLDERS HERE
dropzone.subtitle: or click to choose
dropzone.supports: WHOOP · Apple Health · InBody · DEXA · Garmin · PDF · Image · CSV
dropzone.max_size: up to 15 MB · any common format

privacy_banner.text: ZIPs (WHOOP, Apple Health) are processed exclusively in your browser — only anonymous averages reach our server. PDFs and images are sent encrypted to our AI for extraction and are not stored.

whoop.title: WHOOP
whoop.desc: Upload your WHOOP export ZIP from the last 30 days.
steps: Open the WHOOP app
Profile → Settings → Data Export
Select "Last 90 days" → Export
You'll receive an email with the ZIP file
Upload the ZIP here

apple.title: Apple Health
apple.desc: Upload your Health Export from the iOS Health app — including HRV, steps, and VO2max.
steps: Open the Health app on your iPhone
Tap your profile (top right)
Scroll down → "Export All Health Data"
Wait 2–5 minutes (can take longer)
Share the ZIP file with yourself (AirDrop/email)
Upload it here
apple.note: Large files possible (up to 2 GB) — processing can take a few minutes and runs entirely in your browser.

skip.title: Questionnaire Only
skip.desc: No wearable? No problem — the questionnaire delivers precise scores based on validated methods (WHO, IPAQ, NSF/AASM).

analyse_prepare.upload_hint: Click or drag a file here

errors.unknown: Unknown error while parsing the file.
errors.too_large: File too large. Maximum: 15 MB (except WHOOP and Apple Health ZIPs, which run in the browser).
errors.unknown_zip: We don't recognize this ZIP. Supported: WHOOP export, Apple Health export.
errors.unsupported_format: This file type isn't supported. Supported: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP, CSV, TXT, JSON, ZIP.
errors.heic_unsupported: HEIC/HEIF is not supported. Export the image as JPG or PNG.
errors.low_confidence: Our AI couldn't find reliable health data in this file. Try a different file — or skip the step.
errors.all_failed: No file could be read successfully. Check the file format and try again.
errors.apple_ecg: Apple Health ECG raw data — contains voltage samples, not usable health metrics.

overlay.label: WEARABLE DATA · PROCESSED LOCALLY
overlay.reassurance: Everything runs locally in your browser — the ZIP is not uploaded, only the averages.

review.title: Analysis complete
review.all_failed_warning: No file could be read — you can still continue and fill in the questionnaire manually.

quality.strong_message: Your {sources} data covers {days} days. You're ready to go.
quality.good_recommendation: For more precise body metrics, an InBody or DEXA scan would help.
quality.minimal_message: You can continue — the report will rely heavily on your manual inputs.
quality.minimal_recommendation: Tip: upload a wearable export (WHOOP / Apple Health) for more precise scores.
quality.none_message: No problem — you can fill in the questionnaire entirely manually.

folder_intent.apple_ecg_description: These are individual ECG recordings (raw voltage samples). They don't contain usable health metrics.
folder_intent.apple_gpx_description: These are individual workout routes (GPS tracks). They can be used for activity data — but a full Health export gives you much more.
folder_intent.apple_mixed_description: These are ECG recordings and workout routes. For a complete report we recommend the full export.
folder_intent.main_export_tip:
For a full Apple Health report, upload your main export:
1. Apple Health app → Profile (top right)
2. "Export All Health Data"
3. Wait 2–5 min → you'll get an export.zip
4. Upload that ZIP here — includes sleep, steps, HRV and more

results.section_ai_failed: This analysis couldn't be generated right now — no generic placeholder, please try again.
results.header_title: BOOST THE BEAST LAB · PERFORMANCE REPORT
results.pdf_error_no_assessment: No assessment ID — please restart the analysis.
results.pdf_error_no_url: Server did not return a URL.
results.pdf_error_ai_unavailable: Our AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes — your assessment is safely stored.

save_banner.label: SAVE REPORT
save_banner.desc_email: Create an account in 10 seconds — access your report & PDFs any time from any device.
save_banner.desc_code: Code sent to {email}. Enter it here.

vo2max_card.label: VO2MAX ESTIMATE
vo2max_card.desc: Estimated maximum oxygen uptake based on age, BMI, and activity category. Model: Jackson Non-Exercise (1990).

bmi_card.label: BMI — BODY COMPOSITION
bmi_card.desc: WHO classification of body composition. Optimal: 18.5–24.9 kg/m².

met_card.label: MET MINUTES PER WEEK
met_card.desc: Total activity volume per IPAQ Short Form. Walking (3.3 MET) + Moderate (4.0 MET) + Vigorous (8.0 MET).

plans.heading: YOUR 4 PERSONALIZED PLANS
plans.subtitle: Personalized from your scores — included in your package. Each plan contains concrete protocols, weekly schedules, and scientific recommendations.

activity.label: ACTIVITY PLAN
activity.desc: Training volume, weekly schedule & progression per WHO/ACSM standard

metabolic.label: METABOLIC PLAN
metabolic.desc: Nutrition & hydration protocol per EFSA and DGE guidelines

recovery.label: RECOVERY PLAN
recovery.desc: Sleep hygiene, recovery protocol & weekly structure per NSF

stress.label: STRESS & LIFESTYLE PLAN
stress.desc: Stress reduction, lifestyle optimization & sport as a stress tool

bottom_cta.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This report is provided for general information only and does not replace a physician's visit, medical diagnosis, or treatment recommendation. For any health concerns, please consult a physician. Not a medical device per MDR.

upsell.title: READY FOR REAL LAB DIAGNOSTICS?
upsell.text: Your performance report is based on scientific models — but the most precise measurement happens in the lab. Book a personal consultation and a real VO2max measurement with spiroergometry in Düsseldorf.
features: On-site in Düsseldorf · real lab diagnostics

hero.label: YOUR DATA BASIS

hero.fallback_text: Your report was generated based on your questionnaire answers. Connect a wearable for even more precise insights.
hero.quality_excellent_message: This extensive dataset enables an in-depth, precise analysis of your performance.
hero.quality_strong_message: Your data provides a solid basis for accurate scores and well-founded recommendations.
hero.quality_good_message: Your uploaded data flows directly into the evaluation and improves the report accuracy.
hero.quality_secured_message: Your answers have been carefully evaluated and form the basis of your report.
hero.quality_minimal_message: Your uploaded data flows directly into the evaluation and improves the report accuracy.
hero.quality_none_message: Your answers have been carefully evaluated and form the basis of your report.

plans_detail.error_no_data: No analysis data found. Please restart the analysis.
plans_detail.error_ai_failed: AI generation is currently unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes — we won't generate a generic plan and prefer to wait until real personalised results are possible.
plans_detail.error_ai_timeout: AI generation is taking unusually long. Please try again.
plans_detail.loading_ai_secondary: The AI is analysing your data — this takes up to 60 seconds.
plans_detail.disclaimer: All recommendations are based on published guidelines (WHO, ACSM, NSF, EFSA) and your individually computed scores. Not a substitute for medical or sports-medical advice.

wearable_panel.subtitle: Anonymized aggregates from your WHOOP or Apple Health exports. You can delete each import independently of your reports.

sample_report.banner_desc: This is a sample report with demo data — not a real analysis output.
sample_report.cta_desc: Answer 26 precise questions about your body, training, sleep, and lifestyle — and receive your personalized performance report with real scores and individual recommendations.

unlock.top_priority_desc: The one lever that adds +8 to +12 overall points — tailored to your real values.
unlock.forecast_desc: Which score rises how much if you follow the protocol — including 3 concrete goals with weekly milestones.
unlock.protocol_desc: 8–14 micro-habits for morning · workday · evening · nutrition — each ≤ 10 min, each calibrated to your data.
